caption: Joe Biden is shown from the chest up, speaking in front of the White House. He is wearing a dark blue suit jacket, a white collared shirt, and a blue and white striped tie, with a small lavalier microphone clipped to his tie. The White House stands in the background under a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds, and a fountain is visible in the foreground. To the left and right of the building are lush green trees. Between the frames, the scene remains virtually static; Biden's facial expression and head position shift slightly as he speaks, but the background and his overall posture remain constant. There are no visible logos or on-screen text.
